no-restricted-syntax.message: #252 P3.3 — raw hex colors are banned outside tokens.css / tokenHex.js. Use a CSS variable (var(--color-*)) in stylesheets, or import TOKEN_HEX from '@/utils/tokenHex' for SVG contexts. If this hex is genuinely not a color (e.g. a hash/id/asset key), hoist it to a named constant and disable this rule with a comment explaining why.
